falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3.5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion, invalidating the 'hold' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or blowoff top, refuting the 'unknown' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX closes below 12 for five consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Prolonged extreme low volatility would contradict the pattern's implied market stress, invalidating the hold signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
